nasb.text: The rest of the needs for the house of your God, for which you may have occasion to provide, provide for it from the royal treasury.

esv.text: And whatever else is required for the house of your God, which it falls to you to provide, you may provide it out of the king’s treasury.

cnv.text: 如果你需要支付你　神的殿其餘的費用，你可以從王的庫房裡支付。

ccb.text: 如果你们上帝的殿还需要什么，你可以从国库支取费用。
